tuple_schema.name: str -- submission name (used in the Approval request title).
tuple_schema.E_T_both: float -- E[T] under the both-bugs descending accept-prep decode.
tuple_schema.v: float -- over-accept rate vs wirbel #170 trustworthy region (v<=1.526e-05 is greedy-exact; v>v_tol => illusory speedup).
tuple_schema.step_us: float -- measured denominator step (overlap, microsec-convention matching K_cal=125.26795).
tuple_schema.q_ladder: list[float] -- per-depth accepted-rate ladder q[2..9] (8 entries, the self-KV depths). Inverted through #183's q_d(lambda) -> lambda_hat_built.
tuple_schema.boots_ok: bool -- bootstrap CI available for the finite-sample leg.

worked_example.name: land-71-bothbugs-kernel

descent_only.failing_gate: clear-500 launch-projection LCB (#179): cell-LCB(P>=0.9)=499.97 < 500 (build-gate PASSED at lambda*_LCB=0.9750 -- a build-acceptable kernel that still misses the private-drop launch projection)
descent_only.restoration_lever: ship #154 argmax-only decode (+3.96 TPS LCB -> realizable) or land the both-bugs kernel; descent-only is a knife-edge launch miss at the shipped step even though it clears the #183 build bar.

lambda_gate_logic.rule: per-topology GO iff lambda_hat_built >= lambda*_LCB(topo, tau=1) [#183 REAL card BUILD-gate: both-bugs 0.9052 / descent 0.9750, STRICTER than #178's central 0.838/0.909] AND #179 launch-projection cell-LCB(P>=0.9) >= 500. In the gap [#178-central, #183-LCB) -> wirbel #184 contingency / #154 restore.

numerical_ci_ledger.note: iid +-10.906 numerator leg (B=16384); a LOWER bound on the true half-width.
iid +-10.9 is a LOWER bound (ICC=1 -> N_eff 128->54.9 -> LCB 480.5 FLIPS); consume the correlation-refined bar (stricter-or-equal) when #190 lands.
input-side CI on lambda_hat_built; widens the effective bar margin when landed.
composed in quadrature with the sampling leg; fallback uses #159 sigma_hw=4.86.
private adverse-skew drop may demand a STRICTER bar than public; max()'d into binding_bar.

worked_example.filled_approval_block:
### Approval request: HF job for land-71-bothbugs-kernel

**PRE-FILLED DRAFT (NOT FILED).** A human must approve this filed issue before any spend.
**launch_authorized = False** (analytic_verdict GO; preconditions_all_go False).

**ANALYTIC VERDICT: GO** on the **both_bugs** path at the shipped step 1.2182
(LCB(P>=0.9) 514.88 TPS, P(clear-500) 99.59%, official
535.44 TPS at tau=1.0; tau-low 531.39).

**Composition:** official = K_cal*(E[T]/step)*tau, K_cal=125.26795, tau in [0.9924, 1.0].
clear-500 verdict ANDs TWO finite-sample lower bounds: (1) the BUILD-gate lambda_hat_built
1.0000 >= binding_bar 0.9052
(= max(public#183 0.9052, ICC#190, private#191); source public_183_iid_fallback;
STRICTER than #178's central 0.838 both / 0.909 descent), and (2) the #179 launch-projection
cell-LCB(P>=0.9) >= 500. sigma_hw RETIRED on a separate hardware axis by best-of-2 official
draws (P=0.9829>=0.90).

**Measured-tuple GO table:**
| topology | official (tau=1.0) | proj_private | LCB(P>=0.9) | P(clear-500) | verdict |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| both_bugs | 535.44 | 528.89 | 514.88 | 0.9959 | GO |
| descent_only | 519.96 | 513.89 | 499.97 | 0.8994 | NO-GO |

**Launch-CI ledger -- numerical axes (binding_bar = max; in-flight -> iid-fallback):**
| axis | PR | status | flag | bar/value |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| sampling_iid | #175 | LANDED | consumed | 10.9062 |
| sampling_icc | #190 | IN-FLIGHT | iid-fallback | 0.9052 |
| input_lambda_built | #187 | IN-FLIGHT | pending-input-ci | 0.0000 |
| hardware_oneshot | #188 | IN-FLIGHT | oneshot-fallback | 4.8600 |
| private_bar | #191 | IN-FLIGHT | public-fallback | 0.9052 |

**Launch-CI ledger -- hard precondition rows (any non-GO blocks the launch):**
| precondition | status | flag |
|---|---|---|
| boot_fix_kanna_177 | GO | landed |
| precache_bench | PENDING | serve-config |
| executable_submission_gate_ubel_189 | PENDING | pending-packaging |
| build_lambda_geq_binding_bar | GO | measured |
| human_approval | PENDING | human-gate |

**Submission command (named hard deps -- the human runs this AFTER approval):**
```
PRECACHE_BENCH=1 <serve-harness with land #71 both_bugs kernel + kanna darwin _IncludedRouter boot-fix>
```
  - PRECACHE_BENCH=1 set on the served path.
  - kanna's darwin _IncludedRouter boot-validation startup-500 fix folded into the serve harness.

**Dependency ledger (all required-GREEN before approval):**
  - [BANKED] Numerator E[T] (#160/#165/#172): descent 5.0564 / both 5.2070.
  - [BANKED] Denominator step (#168): shipped 1.2182.
  - [BANKED] Hardware sigma_hw (#159): 4.86 TPS; best-of-2 P=0.9829.
  - [BANKED] Validity (#166/#124): PPL 2.390<=2.42; 128/128; greedy-exact=True.
  - [BANKED] Private drop (#164): tau-low 0.9924.
  - [BANKED] denken #183 margin-aware lambda-card: binding_bar 0.9052 (tau=1) / 0.9234 (tau=0.9924).
  - [IN-FLIGHT] launch-CI axes #190 (ICC) / #187 (lambda-built-CI) / #188 (sigma-oneshot) / #191 (private-bar) -> iid-fallback until landed (bar can only get stricter).
  - [IN-FLIGHT] ubel #189 executable-submission-gate (packaging precondition -- UNVERIFIED).
  - [PENDING-BUILD] land #71 measured tuple (THIS tuple).

**Launch gates (ALL required):** (1) land #71 builds the both_bugs kernel; (2) darwin _IncludedRouter
boot-fix folded; (3) PRECACHE_BENCH=1; (4) a human-approved `Approval request: HF job` issue.
worked_example.human_deferral: This block is PRODUCED, not FILED. A human must approve the filed `Approval request: HF job` issue before any spend.

handoff_line: launch_trigger_calculator: one-call launch_decision(measured_tuple) -> verified GO/NO-GO + filled (un-filed) Approval request. Self-test PASSES. The BINDING lambda-gate is a TYPED launch-CI ledger (advisor 16:53Z): binding_bar = max(public#183 0.9052, ICC#190, private#191) -- all four in-flight axes (#190 ICC, #187 lambda-built-CI, #188 sigma-oneshot, #191 private-bar) degrade to the iid-fallback public bar until they land, then the verdict RECOMPOSES (bar can only get stricter). land #71 must show lambda_hat_built >= binding_bar (0.9052 both-bugs tau=1; 0.9234 tau=0.9924), STRICTER than #178's 0.838 central bar; AND the #179 launch-projection cell-LCB(P>=0.9) >= 500. launch_authorized = (analytic-GO AND all precondition rows GO); preconditions (PRECACHE_BENCH, ubel #189 packaging-gate, human approval) are PENDING -> launch_authorized=False (authorizes nothing). both-bugs clears both LCBs at lambda=1 (514.88, robust GO); descent clears the #183 build bar but misses the #179 launch projection (499.97). both_bugs_go_at_lambda_star=True. Human approval still required before any HF spend.
